name: pool_policy_triage
what: The FULL remaining pool of live corporate industrial EC filers (2025-26, after tiers 1-2), triaged against live policy programs by EIA activity. This is complete coverage of the pool; agent verification runs on the top policy-aligned slices (tier 3 in layer 24).
headline: HALF of India's live industrial EC pipeline is chemicals: 700 of 1,384 remaining filers (51%) are synthetic-organic-chemicals -- sitting exactly on the China import-substitution lever (chemicals are India's largest China-import category; Press Note 2 of 2026 is the FDI-side instrument). Next: metallurgy 321 (specialty-steel PLI), distillery 143 (Ethanol Blending Programme), pesticides 47, fertilizer 26. 140 filers are pharma-NAMED chemicals companies -- the API/KSM-PLI-relevant cohort.

by_policy_program.program: Bulk-drug/API+KSM PLI & China chemicals import-substitution (PN2 lever)
Ethanol Blending Programme E20 (interest subvention, grain ethanol)
infra demand only, no central scheme
Agrochem technicals China import-substitution + export push

scoring: score = policy_weight*10 + filings*3 + recency_bonus(5 if 2026 filing); weights: pharma-named chem 4, chem/pesticides/distillery/MMF 3, steel/fertilizer/petchem 2, cement/paper/other 1
